candidates.why: Explicit D&A-related line, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears as part of a separate overall depreciation/amortization block rather than clearly tied to Materials and services.
Explicit depreciation line that could be operational, but the excerpt does not show it as specifically within COGS or as a child of Materials and services.
Explicit depreciation line, but no clear indication it belongs to the selected COGS bucket rather than broader operating expenses.
Generic depreciation line in one year only; not specifically tied to COGS and sits within the broader D&A block.

variables.notes: Materials and services was selected as the COGS bucket. The statement shows a separate same-level D&A block above operating profit, so D&A does not appear embedded in Materials and services. However, none of the visible D&A rows is explicitly labelled as COGS/cost of sales, and adding any of them to COGS would risk misallocation or double counting. Conservative output is empty pending manual attribution.

candidates.why: Explicit amortization line in the separate D&A block, but not specifically labelled as SG&A/admin/marketing/R&D. Also, R&D is already separately mapped in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding a generic amortization line could distort the intended subtraction logic.

Separate depreciation line outside Employee benefit and Other operating expenses, so it may not be embedded in the selected XSGA bucket; however, it is not clearly attributable to SG&A versus production.
Separate operating depreciation line that could relate to overhead, but the excerpt gives no clear SG&A-specific label.
Generic depreciation line in one year only, separate from selected XSGA rows but not clearly SG&A-specific.

variables.notes: MANUALLY ADDED. Employee benefit and Other operating expenses were selected for XSGA_COMPONENTS. The D&A block appears separate from those rows, so it may not be embedded in the selected XSGA bucket. But the excerpt does not identify any D&A row as SG&A/admin/marketing/R&D-specific, and R&D is already separately handled in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. To avoid double counting and misclassification, no XSGA_DA row is selected automatically.
